name: Kubernetes Cluster Version Upgrade
description: Upgrade Kubernetes cluster to a newer version with rolling updates to minimize disruption

template.description: Upgrading EKS/AKS cluster from Kubernetes {{currentVersion}} to {{targetVersion}}. Cluster has {{nodeCount}} worker nodes running {{podCount}} pods. Upgrade will be performed in stages: control plane first, then node groups with rolling updates. Testing deprecated API versions and validating workload compatibility.
template.currentState: Kubernetes {{currentVersion}} cluster with {{nodeCount}} nodes across 3 availability zones. Running {{podCount}} pods with various workloads (deployments, statefulsets, daemonsets). Using standard CNI, CSI drivers, and ingress controllers.
template.proposedState: Kubernetes {{targetVersion}} cluster with same node count and configuration. All deprecated APIs updated. Workloads tested for compatibility. Rolling node group updates with 25% surge capacity to maintain availability during upgrade.
template.trafficPatterns: Production cluster serving customer traffic 24/7. Peak load during business hours with auto-scaling enabled. Critical services include API gateways, microservices, and data processing jobs. PodDisruptionBudgets configured for high-availability services.
